title: Data Pipeline Path
description: Build fluency in Data Pipeline inside Data Processing by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Time Series Cross-Validation
steps.summary: Time Series Cross-Validation belongs to the Data Processing area of AI/ML, within Data Pipeline. It sits inside Data Processing / Data Pipeline. Start after time series validation and Cross-validation. It opens into Blocked time series cross validation and Cross-validation in time series forecasting.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: time series validation
